home.marquee: RULE THE STREETS — LIMITED EDITIONS — CASABLANCA — EVERY PIECE HAS A STORY —
home.heroSubtitle: Limited, numbered editions. Every piece has a story — once it’s sold out, it’s gone for good.
home.noProducts: No products yet. Run <command>npm run db:seed</command> to add sample products.
home.featureHistoryBody: every design has a reason to exist, told in full on its page.
home.featureNumberedBody: every drop has a fixed number of pieces. Sold out means gone for good.
home.featurePointsBody: every purchase credits your account with points, redeemable for a discount on future orders.

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: All available pieces. Limited editions — once sold out, it’s final.

product.soldOutNotice: This edition is completely sold out. Follow us for the next drop.

cod.label: Cash on delivery
cod.description: Pay in cash to the courier on arrival. No account, no extra fees.

checkout.pointsMinNotice: You need at least {step} points to redeem.
checkout.whatsappNotice: After confirming, you’ll be redirected to WhatsApp with your order details to validate it with us.

errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
